FundTracer

Multi-Chain Blockchain Forensics Platform

Whitepaper v1.0 | March 2026

Abstract

FundTracer is a comprehensive multi-chain blockchain forensics platform designed to provide deep insights into wallet behavior, transaction patterns, and on-chain activity. By combining advanced data aggregation, pattern recognition, and intuitive visualization tools, FundTracer enables analysts, investigators, traders, and developers to trace fund flows, detect coordinated activity, and make informed decisions based on real-time blockchain data.

Mission: Democratize blockchain forensics by providing powerful yet accessible tools that reveal the truth behind on-chain activity. We believe transparency is fundamental to the Web3 ecosystem, and FundTracer makes that transparency actionable.

The platform supports multiple EVM-compatible blockchains with plans to expand to Move-based chains including Sui. Our unified API provides programmatic access to all features, enabling developers to build sophisticated monitoring and analytics tools.

7+
Supported Chains
100K+
Tx Analyzable
<3s
Analysis Time
99.9%
Uptime

1. Introduction

1.1 The Need for Blockchain Forensics

The blockchain ecosystem has grown exponentially, with billions of transactions occurring daily across numerous networks. This proliferation of on-chain activity creates both opportunities and challenges. While transparency is a core feature of blockchain technology, analyzing and interpreting this data requires specialized tools and expertise.

Traditional blockchain explorers provide raw transaction data but lack the analytical depth needed for meaningful investigation. Security researchers, law enforcement, DeFi traders, and project teams need tools that can:

  • Trace fund flows between wallets across multiple chains
  • Identify patterns of coordinated activity (Sybil attacks)
  • Analyze smart contract interactions and token holdings
  • Detect potential fraud, wash trading, or market manipulation
  • Monitor wallets of interest for real-time activity

1.2 What is FundTracer?

FundTracer addresses these needs by providing a unified platform that aggregates data from multiple sources, applies intelligent analysis algorithms, and presents findings through intuitive interfaces designed for both technical and non-technical users.

Key Differentiator: Unlike traditional forensics tools that focus on compliance and surveillance, FundTracer is designed for the broader Web3 ecosystem, serving security researchers, traders, developers, and investigators alike.

1.3 Target Audience

Security Researchers

Investigate hacks, trace stolen funds, identify attack patterns

DeFi Traders

Analyze whale movements, track protocol usage, identify opportunities

Compliance Teams

Support KYC/AML investigations, trace fund origins

Protocol Developers

Understand user behavior, analyze adoption, detect bot activity

2. System Architecture

2.1 Overview

FundTracer employs a multi-layered architecture designed for scalability, reliability, and comprehensive data coverage. The system processes blockchain data through several stages, from raw RPC calls to actionable intelligence.

2.2 Data Aggregation Layer

FundTracer connects to multiple blockchain data providers to ensure comprehensive coverage:

  • Alchemy: Primary RPC provider for transaction data and state queries
  • Moralis: NFT and token balance tracking
  • Chain Explorers: Etherscan, Arbiscan, Basescan for enhanced metadata
  • CoinGecko: Real-time and historical pricing data

2.3 Analysis Engine

The core analysis engine processes raw blockchain data through several stages:

Transaction Parsing

Decodes calldata, identifies token transfers, contract calls, and DeFi interactions

Pattern Detection

Applies heuristics to identify known attack patterns and suspicious behaviors

Graph Analysis

Constructs wallet interaction graphs to identify clusters and coordinated activity

Risk Scoring

Computes risk scores based on transaction patterns and known entity associations

2.4 API Architecture

FundTracer exposes a RESTful API for programmatic access. All endpoints require authentication via API keys.

Endpoint Description
/analyze/wallet Comprehensive wallet analysis
/analyze/funding-tree Trace fund sources and destinations
/analyze/compare Compare wallets for shared activity
/analyze/sybil Detect coordinated activity around contracts
/analyze/contract Analyze smart contract interactions

3. Core Features

3.1 Wallet Analysis

The primary feature provides deep insights into any wallet address:

  • Complete transaction history with decoded events
  • Token holdings (ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155)
  • DeFi protocol interactions (lending, swapping, staking)
  • Gas spending analysis
  • First and last active timestamps
  • Risk score and categorization

3.2 Funding Tree Trace

Visualizes the flow of funds into and out of a wallet:

  • Configurable depth (1-5 levels)
  • Distinguishes between direct and indirect funding sources
  • Identifies common funders across multiple addresses
  • Highlights high-value transactions
  • Exportable as JSON for further analysis

3.3 Sybil Detection

Identifies coordinated activity that may indicate Sybil attacks, bot activity, or wash trading:

  • Analyzes all wallets interacting with a target contract
  • Detects timing patterns suggesting coordinated action
  • Identifies shared funding sources
  • Flags similar transaction patterns
  • Provides confidence scores for findings

3.4 Wallet Comparison

Compares multiple wallets to identify connections:

  • Shared contract interactions
  • Common token holdings
  • Similar timing patterns
  • Connected funding sources

3.5 Portfolio Tracking

Real-time monitoring of wallet portfolios:

  • Token balances across all supported chains
  • NFT collection tracking
  • DeFi position aggregation
  • Portfolio value in USD
  • Historical balance tracking

4. Supported Blockchains

FundTracer currently supports multiple EVM-compatible networks with more coming soon.

Ethereum
● Supported
Linea
● Supported
Arbitrum
● Supported
Base
● Supported
Optimism
● Supported
Polygon
● Supported
BNB Chain
● Supported
Sui
○ Coming Soon

4.1 Upcoming: Sui Blockchain

FundTracer is expanding to support the Sui blockchain, a high-performance Move-based Layer 1 blockchain developed by Mysten Labs. Sui offers:

  • Horizontal scaling without sharding
  • Sub-second finality
  • Rich object model with built-in provenance
  • Powerful smart contracts in Move

Sui support will include wallet analysis, transaction tracing, and integration with Sui's unique object-centric data model.

5. Use Cases

5.1 Security Research

Investigate wallet addresses associated with hacks, exploits, or fraudulent schemes. Trace stolen funds across multiple chains and identify potential laundering patterns.

5.2 DeFi Analytics

Analyze wallet behavior of known traders, whale movements, and protocol usage. Identify institutional activity and track token accumulation patterns.

5.3 Compliance & Investigation

Support KYC/AML investigations by tracing fund origins and identifying connections between addresses. Generate audit reports for regulatory submissions.

5.4 Protocol Development

Understand user behavior, analyze adoption patterns, and detect bot activity around token launches or airdrops.

5.5 Due Diligence

Research wallet addresses before transactions. Verify counterparty reliability and identify potential risks in on-chain dealings.

5.6 NFT Analytics

Track NFT portfolio changes, identify wash trading patterns in collections, and analyze creator royalty distributions.

6. Product Suite

6.1 Web Application

Browser-based interface at fundtracer.xyz/app-evm. No installation required. Supports all EVM chains with intuitive visualization.

6.2 CLI Tool

Command-line interface for power users. Install via: npm install -g fundtracer-cli

6.3 Telegram Bot

Real-time wallet alerts delivered to Telegram. Set up at fundtracer.xyz/telegram.

6.4 Chrome Extension

Embeds FundTracer into Etherscan and block explorers. Download from fundtracer.xyz/ext-install.

6.5 Pricing

Tier Price API Keys Features
Free $0 2 keys Basic analysis, EVM chains
Pro $0 Unlimited Sybil detection, all chains
Max $0 Unlimited Priority support, dedicated infrastructure
All tiers are currently free during the beta period. No credit card required.

7. Security & Privacy

  • No Data Retention: FundTracer does not store user query history
  • Read-Only: All operations are read-only; no transactions can be initiated
  • API Key Security: Keys are hashed and never exposed in logs
  • Firebase Auth: Secure authentication with industry-standard practices
  • HTTPS Only: All communications encrypted in transit
  • Rate Limiting: Built-in protection against abuse

8. Roadmap

  • Q2 2026: Sui blockchain integration
  • Q3 2026: AI-powered pattern recognition
  • Q4 2026: Real-time whale movement alerts
  • 2027: Solana, Aptos expansion

9. Conclusion

FundTracer provides a comprehensive solution for blockchain forensics and wallet analysis. By combining multiple data sources, advanced pattern detection, and intuitive interfaces, it serves the needs of security researchers, DeFi traders, compliance teams, and developers alike.

Get Started: Visit fundtracer.xyz to begin analyzing wallets today. All tiers are currently free to use.
